definition.content:
# NOTE:

To utilize this dashboard, you must add attributes to your telemetry to tag which collector role received the initial telemetry.

### Agent Collector

An Agent Collector should set an attribute named `collector.role` to `agent`.

#### Example:

```yaml
  processors:
    attributes/agent:
      actions:
        - key: collector.role
          value: agent
          action: insert
...
  service:
    pipelines:
      metrics:
        receivers: [...]
        processors:
          - attributes/agent
        exporters: [...]
```

### Gateway

A Gateway Collector should set `collector.role` to `gateway`.

#### Example:

```yaml
  processors:
    attributes/gateway:
      actions:
        - key: collector.role
          value: gateway
          action: insert
...
  service:
    pipelines:
      metrics:
        receivers: [...]
        processors:
          - attributes/gateway
        exporters: [...]
```

definition.title: Batch Send Size by Signal Type
